# Validation

<!-- How was this tested? Local tests, Docker E2E, Fabric E2E, manual? -->

- [ ] Docker E2E (`tests/docker_e2e/`) passes for the affected feeder(s)

- [ ] Updated documentation if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, connection strings, tenant IDs, or workspace GUIDs committed
